html: Automated Continuous Commissioning Unlocks $200K+ At A Specialized Dementia Care Facility
text: Automated Continuous Commissioning Unlocks $200K+ At A Specialized Dementia Care Facility

html: From manual commissioning to automated continuous commissioning that cuts wrap-up liability and delivers six-figure annual savings.
text: From manual commissioning to automated continuous commissioning that cuts wrap-up liability and delivers six-figure annual savings.

html: Solution Provider: Novem Digital | Customer: A specialized dementia and long-term care facility in Western Canada | Location: Western Canada | Asset: 4-storey, purpose-built dementia and long-term care facility with underground parking
text: Solution Provider: Novem Digital | Customer: A specialized dementia and long-term care facility in Western Canada | Location: Western Canada | Asset: 4-storey, purpose-built dementia and long-term care facility with underground parking

html: BACKGROUND: High-Acuity Care Requires Reliable, Efficient Buildings
text: BACKGROUND: High-Acuity Care Requires Reliable, Efficient Buildings

html: A specialized dementia and long-term care facility provides care for more than 200 residents in a 4-storey building above a large underground parkade. The completed construction cost was approximately $53M, with complex mechanical and electrical systems needed to support vulnerable residents.
text: A specialized dementia and long-term care facility provides care for more than 200 residents in a 4-storey building above a large underground parkade. The completed construction cost was approximately $53M, with complex mechanical and electrical systems needed to support vulnerable residents.

html: Leadership needed to ensure the building performed as designed, both to protect residents and to prove financial performance to owners and insurers.
text: Leadership needed to ensure the building performed as designed, both to protect residents and to prove financial performance to owners and insurers.

html: THE CHALLENGE: Traditional Commissioning Leaves Value On The Table
text: THE CHALLENGE: Traditional Commissioning Leaves Value On The Table

html: Standard commissioning practices often leave issues undetected until after handover, when they become more expensive to fix and harder to quantify. For this facility, any underperformance would affect comfort, energy use, and ultimately Total Cost of Risk Ownership.
text: Standard commissioning practices often leave issues undetected until after handover, when they become more expensive to fix and harder to quantify. For this facility, any underperformance would affect comfort, energy use, and ultimately Total Cost of Risk Ownership.

html: Key risks included:
text: Key risks included:

html: Mechanical equipment not running as specified
text: Mechanical equipment not running as specified

html: Air handling issues affecting pressurization and comfort
text: Air handling issues affecting pressurization and comfort

html: Undetected control problems driving up energy use and wear
text: Undetected control problems driving up energy use and wear

html: The owner needed a way to validate performance in real time, document issues for insurance and construction teams, and avoid paying for hidden inefficiencies.
text: The owner needed a way to validate performance in real time, document issues for insurance and construction teams, and avoid paying for hidden inefficiencies.

html: THE SOLUTION: Automated Continuous Commissioning On The Digital Risk Platform
text: THE SOLUTION: Automated Continuous Commissioning On The Digital Risk Platform

html: Novem Digital deployed its Automated Continuous Commissioning (ACC) solution, enabled by the Digital Risk Platform, across key building systems.
text: Novem Digital deployed its Automated Continuous Commissioning (ACC) solution, enabled by the Digital Risk Platform, across key building systems.

html: Analytics On Air Handling And Pressurization
text: Analytics On Air Handling And Pressurization

html: Analytics monitored fan drives in air handling units and flagged units that were not operational. Investigation revealed drives that had not been properly commissioned and could not run. Correcting these issues ensured proper pressurization and prevented cold air from infiltrating resident spaces.
text: Analytics monitored fan drives in air handling units and flagged units that were not operational. Investigation revealed drives that had not been properly commissioned and could not run. Correcting these issues ensured proper pressurization and prevented cold air from infiltrating resident spaces.

html: ACC also identified rooftop units that were not responding correctly to heating calls. With digital forensics, contractors resolved the control issues, allowing equipment to function as intended.
text: ACC also identified rooftop units that were not responding correctly to heating calls. With digital forensics, contractors resolved the control issues, allowing equipment to function as intended.

html: Energy Waste And Filter Management
text: Energy Waste And Filter Management

html: Analytics flagged air filter pressure drops indicating dirty filters. In response, technicians replaced filters before fans ran at higher speeds to compensate, reducing wasted energy and stress on equipment.
text: Analytics flagged air filter pressure drops indicating dirty filters. In response, technicians replaced filters before fans ran at higher speeds to compensate, reducing wasted energy and stress on equipment.

html: Heat Exchanger And Critical Equipment Monitoring
text: Heat Exchanger And Critical Equipment Monitoring

html: Heat exchanger analytics revealed supply temperatures below expected levels. Further investigation found manual isolation valves closed and circulation pumps overridden off at the local panel. Once corrected, heating performance returned to specifications.
text: Heat exchanger analytics revealed supply temperatures below expected levels. Further investigation found manual isolation valves closed and circulation pumps overridden off at the local panel. Once corrected, heating performance returned to specifications.

html: Laundry dryer monitoring identified false run status signals and issues with lint traps and door switches. Continuous monitoring ensured this critical support equipment remained functional and compliant with vendor specifications.
text: Laundry dryer monitoring identified false run status signals and issues with lint traps and door switches. Continuous monitoring ensured this critical support equipment remained functional and compliant with vendor specifications.

html: BY THE NUMBERS: The Impact
text: BY THE NUMBERS: The Impact

html: $93K reduction in costs during the handover process, demonstrating a reduction in wrap-up liability premiums
text: $93K reduction in costs during the handover process, demonstrating a reduction in wrap-up liability premiums

html: $109,326 in annual operating savings enabled by Novem’s Digital Risk Platform and ACC
text: $109,326 in annual operating savings enabled by Novem’s Digital Risk Platform and ACC

html: WHAT THE NUMBERS MEAN
text: WHAT THE NUMBERS MEAN

html: Implementing Automated Continuous Commissioning proved that commissioning can be both a risk control and a financial lever. The $93K handover saving reduced wrap-up liability costs and provided evidence that performance issues were detected and resolved before they turned into claims or chronic operating inefficiencies.
text: Implementing Automated Continuous Commissioning proved that commissioning can be both a risk control and a financial lever. The $93K handover saving reduced wrap-up liability costs and provided evidence that performance issues were detected and resolved before they turned into claims or chronic operating inefficiencies.

html: Annual operating savings above $100K strengthen cash flow and support reinvestment in resident programs, staffing, and reserves. Leadership can now quantify how improved building performance supports both care quality and financial resilience.
text: Annual operating savings above $100K strengthen cash flow and support reinvestment in resident programs, staffing, and reserves. Leadership can now quantify how improved building performance supports both care quality and financial resilience.

html: In practice, the facility is monetizing data. Commissioning and performance data now translate directly into lower risk-related costs, reduced insurance exposure, and higher operating efficiency, turning what used to be a cost of doing business into a recurring financial return.
text: In practice, the facility is monetizing data. Commissioning and performance data now translate directly into lower risk-related costs, reduced insurance exposure, and higher operating efficiency, turning what used to be a cost of doing business into a recurring financial return.

html: THE TRANSFORMATION: From Hidden Issues To Measured Performance
text: THE TRANSFORMATION: From Hidden Issues To Measured Performance

html: For owners and insurers: The facility now has data that validates performance for insurance, owners, and construction teams, demonstrating that risk is actively managed rather than assumed.
text: For owners and insurers: The facility now has data that validates performance for insurance, owners, and construction teams, demonstrating that risk is actively managed rather than assumed.

html: For operators and facilities teams: Staff rely on continuous analytics to catch issues early, schedule corrective work efficiently, and keep critical systems operating within specification.
text: For operators and facilities teams: Staff rely on continuous analytics to catch issues early, schedule corrective work efficiently, and keep critical systems operating within specification.

html: For residents and families: While they may never see the analytics directly, residents benefit from more stable temperatures, more reliable systems, and fewer disruptions, all in a facility that runs closer to its intended performance.
text: For residents and families: While they may never see the analytics directly, residents benefit from more stable temperatures, more reliable systems, and fewer disruptions, all in a facility that runs closer to its intended performance.

html: LOOKING FORWARD: Scaling ACC As Standard Practice
text: LOOKING FORWARD: Scaling ACC As Standard Practice

html: The success at this facility positions Automated Continuous Commissioning as a standard for future projects and retrofits in the operator’s portfolio. By treating commissioning as a continuous process rather than a one-time event, organizations can protect cash flow, reduce Total Cost of Risk Ownership, and provide better environments for high-acuity residents.
text: The success at this facility positions Automated Continuous Commissioning as a standard for future projects and retrofits in the operator’s portfolio. By treating commissioning as a continuous process rather than a one-time event, organizations can protect cash flow, reduce Total Cost of Risk Ownership, and provide better environments for high-acuity residents.

html: ABOUT NOVEM DIGITAL
text: ABOUT NOVEM DIGITAL

Novem predicts and prevents equipment failures before they happen so leaders can reduce Total Cost of Risk Ownership, protect cash flow, and manage risk-related costs with confidence.
